SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.config

Class AddressPipelineProperties

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.config.AddressPipelineProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="address.pipeline") public class AddressPipelineProperties extends Object
Typed configuration properties for the address pipeline. Part of the config package — binds the address.pipeline.* prefix from application.yml to strongly typed fields. Registered via IntegrationConfig. The nested AddressPipelineProperties.Header class maps column header names configured in address.pipeline.header.* to the physical column labels used in the Loan Tape Google Sheet. This allows the sheet layout to evolve without code changes — only the YAML needs to be updated.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    AddressPipelineProperties.Header
    Maps logical field names to the physical column header labels used in the sheet.

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Returns whether the pipeline is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if the pipeline will run on startup

    • setEnabled

      public void setEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Sets the pipeline enabled flag.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to allow the pipeline to run

    • isDryRun

      public boolean isDryRun()
      Returns whether dry-run mode is active.
      Returns:
      true if write-back to Google Sheets is suppressed

    • setDryRun

      public void setDryRun(boolean dryRun)
      Sets the dry-run flag.
      Parameters:
      dryRun - true to suppress Google Sheets write-back

    • getHeaderRow

      public int getHeaderRow()
      Returns the 1-based index of the header row.
      Returns:
      header row number (default 2)

    • setHeaderRow

      Sets the header row index.
